name: Chicken Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 whole skinless boneless chicken breast, cooked and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta.
2. Drain and cool.
3. Place pasta and remaining salad ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Whisk together dressing ingredients and pour over salad.
5. Toss gently but thoroughly.
6. Refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight.
7. To serve, mound salad on spinach leaves and garnish with kiwis and tangerines.
